title: lycopersicon peruvianum subsp. commutatum
intro: Lycopersicon peruvianum subsp. commutatum, also known as the Chilean wild tomato or Peruvian wild tomato, is a subspecies of wild tomato native to the Andean regions of South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lycopersicon peruvianum subsp. commutatum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues and skin problems.
